I see that you seek clarity on "How can you make a habit of breaking your habits?". The following reading will unveil the path forward:

The Present Moment: The card drawn is the Nine of Wands (upright). Visually, this card is known for a weary man with a bandaged head leaning on a wand, standing guard before eight others--symbolizing resilience and defense. As the Situation card, it brings a strong message: 'Bearing up under incredible duress'. This describes the core dynamic you currently face.

The Key Action: The card drawn is the Four of Swords (reversed). The traditional imagery of this card depicts a knight lying on a tomb with hands in prayer, one sword beneath him--symbolizing rest and recovery. As the Action/Advice card, it brings a strong message: 'Adopting a point of view and refusing to reconsider your conclusions, even when presented with refuting evidence'. This offers the vital counsel on how to proceed.

The Destiny Unveiled: The card drawn is the Three of Wands (upright). The scene on this card shows a man standing on a cliff watching ships sail across the sea, holding a wand--symbolizing progress and expansion. As the Outcome/Result card, it brings a strong message: 'Going beyond your limits'. This stands as the ultimate signifier for the answer to your question.

The cosmos confirms your reading with a final message: Be on the lookout: your ship is coming in. During your journey, I advise you to repeat this sacred affirmation: 'When the going gets tough, I stay the course.' Go forth, for the power to choose is always your own.
